title: Verily, verily
firstLine: Oh, what a Savior that He died for me!
publicDomainBasis: James McGranahan (1840–1907), James McGranahan (1840–1907). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Oh, what a Savior that He died for me!
From condemnation He hath made me free;
“He that believeth on the Son” saith He,
“Hath everlasting life.”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
All my iniquities on Him were laid,
All my indebtedness by Him was paid;
All who believe on Him, the Lord hath said,
“Hath everlasting life.”

sections.label: Chorus
Chorus
sections.text:
Though all unworthy, yet I will not doubt;
For him that cometh He will not cast out:
“He that believeth”—oh, the good news shout!
“Hath everlasting life.”
